* **IMMZD2DTSeasonalinfluenza2DoseLogic**

## Library: IMMZD2DTSeasonalinfluenza2DoseLogic 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD2DTSeasonalinfluenza2DoseLogic | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2025-11-14 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD2DTSeasonalinfluenza2DoseLogic |

 
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Seasonal influenza decision table in the Immunization CPG
